description: Configuration for WPL Auction System — Impossible difficulty (hyper-aggressive AI valuation)

squadSize.description: Minimum 18 players, maximum 25 players per squad

priceSlabs.description: Base price tiers based on player primary playstyle rating

bidIncrements.description: Bid increment amounts based on current price

timing.description: Bid timer in seconds, AI bid delay range in seconds

marquee.description: Players with primary playstyle rating >= 90 are Marquee players (auctioned first)

rounds.description: Number of players auctioned per round (shuffled within round)

aiStrategy.description: AI bidding behavior configuration — Impossible: AI overshoots fair value, burns reserve aggressively

conservativeMode.description: Reserve 20% of budget to ensure minimum squad completion

valuation.description: AI player valuation tuning — Impossible difficulty (aggressive)

budgetPenalty.description: Linearly interpolated from minPenalty (at $0 budget per needed player) up to maxPenalty (at or above stingyThresholdPerPlayer)

marqueeMultiplier.description: Star-player multiplier on AI maxBid — Impossible: hard chase on marquees

performanceBonusClamp.description: Clamp on calculatePerformanceBonus output, expressed as ratio of player's soldPrice

qualityTiers.description: Rating thresholds for player quality categorization

idealSquadComposition.description: Target numbers for squad quality composition

playstyleRatingQuotas.description: Total playstyle rating targets for each category - category player count * 10

playstyleCategoryMapping.description: Maps specific playstyles to broader categories
